title: JMS we create smile Teaching Time Puzzle Clock, Educational Shape Sorting Fun, Ages 18+ Months - Learn Time & Match Shape
features: EDUCATIONAL TOY: Combines teaching time concepts with shape sorting activities in a colourful, engaging puzzle clock design for early learning
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specifically designed for toddlers 18 months and older, featuring large, easy-to-handle pieces that are perfect for small hands
LEARNING FEATURES: Includes 12 removable number pieces in different shapes and colours, helping children learn number recognition and shape matching
INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Cheerful character face with movable clock hands allows children to practice telling time while having fun
DEVELOPMENTAL BENEFITS: Enhances fine motor skills, cognitive development, shape recognition, and number learning through hands-on play
description: Product description Introduce your little one to the joy of learning time with the FunTime Teaching Time Puzzle Clock! This delightful educational toy combines shape sorting fun with early time-telling skills, perfect for toddlers aged 18 months and up. The cheerful clock face features a friendly animal character and comes with 12 colourful, removable number pieces, each uniquely shaped to fit specific slots around the clock. As children match the shapes and numbers, they develop fine motor skills, shape recognition, and number sequencing abilities. The large, easy-to-handle pieces are ideal for little hands, while the bright colours and engaging design keep young minds interested. This versatile learning toy helps establish early mathematics concepts and time awareness through hands-on play. The sturdy construction ensures durability for long-lasting educational fun. It's an excellent tool for parent-child interaction and early learning development, making it a valuable addition to any toddler's toy collection. Safety Warning Do not suitable for age less than 18 Months
